PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?snake ?snakeLabel ?ld50(GROUP_CONCAT(?countryLabel ; separator = ", ") as ?countries) WHERE {
  ?snake wdt:P171 + wd:Q200220 .
  ?snake wdt:P1774 wd:Q354098 .
  ?snake wdt:P2240 ?ld50 .
  ?snake wdt:P17 ?country .
  ?snake rdfs:label ?snakeLabel .
  ?country rdfs:label ?countryLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?snakeLabel) = "en")
  FILTER(LANG(?countryLabel) = "en")
}
GROUP BY ?snake ?snakeLabel ?ld50
ORDER BY ASC(?ld50)
LIMIT 10
